name: Fast 'n Easy Chili
recipeIngredient: 1 envelope Lipton Recipe Secrets - Beefy Mushroom recipe
1 can Red kidney beans, drained (16 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, brown the ground beef over medium-high heat; drain.
2. Stir in the remaining ingredients. Simmer covered, stirring occasionally for 20 minutes.
